metadata.weekday_plan: Reading - vocabulary in context / inference / main idea

vocabulary.definition_tw: 與「忽略」相關的常用片語

vocabulary.usage_note_tw: 此項目作為 TOEFL/IELTS 與日常商務表達的可抽取詞彙或片語。

grammar_focus.title: Using 'One reason is that...' to Extend an Answer
grammar_focus.function: 延展 TOEFL independent speaking 理由。
grammar_focus.explanation_tw: 表達意見後用 One reason is that... 加上具體原因，避免回答太短。
grammar_focus.pattern: In my opinion, S + V. One reason is that S + V.
grammar_focus.example_basic: In my opinion, online learning is useful. One reason is that it is flexible.
grammar_focus.example_advanced: In my opinion, online learning is highly practical. One reason is that it allows busy adults to review lessons at their own pace.

reading.title: Academic Skills for Test Success
reading.text: Success on TOEFL and IELTS depends on more than memorizing word lists. Students must learn to understand passages, identify key ideas in context, and draw reasonable conclusions from incomplete information. Today's lesson highlights language such as 'ignore a response', 'transform', 'industry and examples', and 'insight', because these terms often appear in academic reading, lectures, or discussion prompts. In listening tasks, recognizing signal words helps learners interpret the speaker's attitude and purpose. When writing academic responses, it is important to present a clear position and support it with evidence. Many instructors recommend combining input and output activities because the two reinforce each other. A structured review plan ensures that difficult topics receive enough attention before exam day. From phrases like 'attitude strategy', 'exposure and examples', and 'highly available', learners can extract patterns they can reuse in speaking and writing. Candidates who practice under timed conditions become more comfortable with the pace of real exams. They also learn to prioritize high-value tasks such as summarizing main ideas and organizing supporting details. This balanced approach helps candidates move toward their target score without unnecessary stress or last-minute cramming.
reading.translation_tw: TOEFL 與 IELTS 的成功不只靠背單字。學生必須學會分析文章、在上下文中辨識關鍵概念，並從不完整資訊中做出合理推論。聽力任務中，辨識訊號詞有助於詮釋說話者態度。學術寫作回應時，清楚表明立場並以證據支持很重要。許多教師提倡結合輸入與輸出活動，因兩者相輔相成。全面的複習計畫確保困難主題在考試前獲得足夠關注。從每個觀點中，學習者應萃取可重複用於口說與寫作的實用片語。這種平衡策略幫助考生達成目標分數而不必過度焦慮。

listening_speaking.sentence: Success on TOEFL and IELTS depends on more than memorizing word lists.
listening_speaking.pronunciation_tips_tw: 注意功能詞的連音與重音位置，先慢速再加速。
listening_speaking.shadowing_steps_tw: 先聽一次，再逐句跟讀，最後不看文字朗讀。

listening_speaking.sentence: Students must learn to understand passages, identify key ideas in context, and draw reasonable conclusions from incomplete information.
listening_speaking.pronunciation_tips_tw: 留意 and、to、of 等虛詞的弱化發音。
listening_speaking.shadowing_steps_tw: 先慢速跟讀兩遍，再加速至正常語速。

listening_speaking.sentence: Today's lesson highlights language such as 'ignore a response', 'transform', 'industry and examples', and 'insight', because these terms often appear in academic reading, lectures, or discussion prompts.
listening_speaking.pronunciation_tips_tw: 句尾語調略下降，表示陳述句結束。
listening_speaking.shadowing_steps_tw: 分段練習後，最後整句連貫朗讀一次。

toefl_skill_drill.instruction_tw: 請依今日所學完成一題 TOEFL 導向練習，口說 45 秒或寫 3–4 句。
toefl_skill_drill.prompt: What are two key points you would write in your notes about today's topic?
toefl_skill_drill.response_framework: I believe ___. One reason is that ___. For example, ___. As a result, ___.
toefl_skill_drill.sample_answer: I believe daily practice is essential. One reason is that it builds ignore a response over time. For example, I review vocabulary every morning before work. As a result, I feel more prepared for academic tasks.

daily_quiz.question: Which definition best matches 'ignore a response'?
options: A. 與「忽略」相關的常用片語
C. 與「產業」相關的常用片語
daily_quiz.explanation_tw: 今日單字 ignore a response 的解釋為「與「忽略」相關的常用片語」。

daily_quiz.question: What is the main idea of today's reading?
options: A. Effective learning requires consistent, structured practice.
B. Cramming once a week is the best method.
C. Vocabulary lists alone guarantee a high score.
D. Test preparation should avoid speaking practice.
daily_quiz.explanation_tw: 文章強調有限時間下，持續且結構化的練習才能帶來進步。

daily_quiz.question: Which sentence uses today's grammar pattern correctly?
options: A. I like English. Because it is useful.
B. In my opinion, practice helps. One reason is that it builds fluency.
D. English hard but I try.
daily_quiz.explanation_tw: 選項 B 正確運用 In my opinion... One reason is that... 句型。

history_update.grammar_today: Using 'One reason is that...' to Extend an Answer

gmail_email.subject: Day 8 英文學習｜Career Development and Networking
gmail_email.html_body:
Day 8 英文學習

今日主題：Career Development and Networking

階段：Foundation · 程度：B1+ · 預估：17 分鐘

今日訓練：Reading - vocabulary in context / inference / main idea

今日單字

單字音標解釋狀態
ignore a response與「忽略」相關的常用片語新詞
transform轉變新詞
industry and examples與「產業」相關的常用片語新詞
insight洞察新詞
attitude strategy與「態度」相關的常用片語新詞
exposure and examples與「接觸；暴露」相關的常用片語新詞
highly available與「可取得的」相關的常用片語新詞
characteristic and examples與「特徵」相關的常用片語新詞
equivalent in academic writing與「相等的；等同物」相關的常用片語新詞
circumstance development與「情況」相關的常用片語新詞
mode development與「模式」相關的常用片語新詞
analyze/ˈænəlaɪz/分析新詞
engage evidence與「參與；吸引」相關的常用片語新詞
adapt information與「適應；調整」相關的常用片語新詞
key expectation與「期待」相關的常用片語新詞
conventional in daily communication與「傳統的」相關的常用片語複習
key mechanism與「機制」相關的常用片語複習
framework架構複習
retain/rɪˈteɪn/保留；記住複習
highlight effectively與「強調；亮點」相關的常用片語複習

文法重點

Using 'One reason is that...' to Extend an Answer

表達意見後用 One reason is that... 加上具體原因，避免回答太短。

In my opinion, S + V. One reason is that S + V.

In my opinion, online learning is highly practical. One reason is that it allows busy adults to review lessons at their own pace.

閱讀：Academic Skills for Test Success

Success on TOEFL and IELTS depends on more than memorizing word lists. Students must learn to understand passages, identify key ideas in context, and draw reasonable conclusions from incomplete information. Today's lesson highlights language such as 'ignore a response', 'transform', 'industry and examples', and 'insight', because these terms often appear in academic reading, lectures, or discussion prompts. In listening tasks, recognizing signal words helps learners interpret the speaker's attitude and purpose. When writing academic responses, it is important to present a clear position and support it with evidence. Many instructors recommend combining input and output activities because the two reinforce each other. A structured review plan ensures that difficult topics receive enough attention before exam day. From phrases like 'attitude strategy', 'exposure and examples', and 'highly available', learners can extract patterns they can reuse in speaking and writing. Candidates who practice under timed conditions become more comfortable with the pace of real exams. They also learn to prioritize high-value tasks such as summarizing main ideas and organizing supporting details. This balanced approach helps candidates move toward their target score without unnecessary stress or last-minute cramming.

中文翻譯：TOEFL 與 IELTS 的成功不只靠背單字。學生必須學會分析文章、在上下文中辨識關鍵概念，並從不完整資訊中做出合理推論。聽力任務中，辨識訊號詞有助於詮釋說話者態度。學術寫作回應時，清楚表明立場並以證據支持很重要。許多教師提倡結合輸入與輸出活動，因兩者相輔相成。全面的複習計畫確保困難主題在考試前獲得足夠關注。從每個觀點中，學習者應萃取可重複用於口說與寫作的實用片語。這種平衡策略幫助考生達成目標分數而不必過度焦慮。

跟讀練習（3 句）

第 1 句

Success on TOEFL and IELTS depends on more than memorizing word lists.

發音提示：注意功能詞的連音與重音位置，先慢速再加速。

跟讀步驟：先聽一次，再逐句跟讀，最後不看文字朗讀。

第 2 句

Students must learn to understand passages, identify key ideas in context, and draw reasonable conclusions from incomplete information.

發音提示：留意 and、to、of 等虛詞的弱化發音。

跟讀步驟：先慢速跟讀兩遍，再加速至正常語速。

第 3 句

Today's lesson highlights language such as 'ignore a response', 'transform', 'industry and examples', and 'insight', because these terms often appear in academic reading, lectures, or discussion prompts.

發音提示：句尾語調略下降，表示陳述句結束。

跟讀步驟：分段練習後，最後整句連貫朗讀一次。

TOEFL 技能訓練

請依今日所學完成一題 TOEFL 導向練習，口說 45 秒或寫 3–4 句。

題目：What are two key points you would write in your notes about today's topic?

架構：I believe ___. One reason is that ___. For example, ___. As a result, ___.

範例：I believe daily practice is essential. One reason is that it builds ignore a response over time. For example, I review vocabulary every morning before work. As a result, I feel more prepared for academic tasks.

每日測驗（含答案）

Q1. Which definition best matches 'ignore a response'?

  • A. 與「忽略」相關的常用片語
  • B. 轉變
  • C. 與「產業」相關的常用片語
  • D. 洞察

答案：A — 今日單字 ignore a response 的解釋為「與「忽略」相關的常用片語」。

Q2. What is the main idea of today's reading?

  • A. Effective learning requires consistent, structured practice.
  • B. Cramming once a week is the best method.
  • C. Vocabulary lists alone guarantee a high score.
  • D. Test preparation should avoid speaking practice.

答案：A — 文章強調有限時間下，持續且結構化的練習才能帶來進步。

Q3. Which sentence uses today's grammar pattern correctly?

  • A. I like English. Because it is useful.
  • B. In my opinion, practice helps. One reason is that it builds fluency.
  • C. Practice good and fun.
  • D. English hard but I try.

答案：B — 選項 B 正確運用 In my opinion... One reason is that... 句型。

祝學習順利！明日 09:00 將寄送下一課。
